rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §28.022, which governs parental notice of student performance. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 28.022. NOTICE TO PARENT OF UNSATISFACTORY PERFORMANCE; CONFERENCES.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses school district parent-notification policies, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
